name: Crescent Quest
short_description: Crescent Quest is a mostly medieval turn based open world RPG that is inspired by 2000s MMO / MMORPG designs while being a single player experience. Increase your skills, go on unique quests, grind for and collect rare items, join the world of Reltionus which is over ten years old!
detailed_description:
Enter the world of Reltionus, exploring the worlds regions as your own character on your own adventure, uncovering many mysteries of the world and other realms. You may get sidetracked with many quests, areas, skills, and customization that will keep you busy. Begin your adventure in the open world of Crescent Quest today!

Crescent Quest is inspired by old 2000s MMO / MMORPG designs while still being a unique, single player only experience. There's currently 17 skills to gain experience in, 30+ quests to discover, and 10+ Chyfrinx to collect and raise. Feel free to join and mark your name in the history of Crescent Quest and join the growing world of Reltionus, including the community for the game!

Crescent Quest will continue to be formed over time indefinitely and there are many events year-round to be a part of including events for various holidays such as Easter, Halloween, and Christmas. Don't miss out if you are a completionist! Crescent Quest has been in development for over ten years and it will keep receiving updates for an indefinite amount of time.

Only specific controllers are compatible with the game, when using a keyboard and mouse only the keyboard will be in use, the mouse is not used within the game.

As Crescent Quest receives updates the screenshots and trailer on this store page may change, in-game content and visuals may also change over time.

Crescent Quest is powered by the RPG Maker VX Ace engine. The in-game music is from the RPG Maker VX Ace engine. The trailer music is composed by Irene Chan.
